AuxiliaryFieldAlias

Optional look-up that maps field names to possile metadata property names.

Returns

IPropertySet

AuxiliaryFields

Fields to be created and populated in the raster catalog when a builder is used.

BuilderName

The builder class name.

Returns

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

CanBuild(object)

Indicates whether the raster builder recognizes the specified data source and is possibly capable of building a valid function raster dataset from it.

virtual bool CanBuild(object vtDataSource)

Parameters

vtDataSource object

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

CanBuildInPlace

Indicates whether the raster type can build an item URI as soon as it is contructed.

virtual bool CanBuildInPlace { get; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

CanMergeItems

Indicates whether the raster builder is capable of building composite crawled items.

virtual bool CanMergeItems { get; }

Returns

bool

Sample Snippet

pFunctionTemplate IRasterFunctionTemplate

Returns

bool

ConstructURIs(object)

Constructs one or more item URI objects given the crawled data source item.

virtual void ConstructURIs(object crawlerItem)

Parameters

crawlerItem object

Examples

Sample Snippet

CrawlerName

The crawler class name.

virtual string CrawlerName { get; set; }

Returns

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

DefaultSpatialReference

The default spatial reference associated with the collection of items built by this raster type. A raster type applies the default spatial reference to every incoming dataset that doesn't have an associated spatial reference.

virtual ISpatialReference DefaultSpatialReference { get; set; }

Returns

ISpatialReference

Examples

Sample Snippet

EndConstruction()

Shuts down the raster builder object upon completion of URI construction. Once all item URIs are constructed and returned via repated calls to the GetNextURI, this method might return an array of item URIs possibly created as a result of the shut down process.

virtual IItemURIArray EndConstruction()

Returns

IItemURIArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

GetNextURI()

Returns the next available item URI object.

virtual IItemURI GetNextURI()

Returns

IItemURI

Examples

Sample Snippet

MosaicDataset

The mosaic dataset associated with this operation.

virtual IMosaicDataset MosaicDataset { get; set; }

Returns

IMosaicDataset

Examples

Sample Snippet

MultidimensionalInfo

The multidimensional info object associated with the raster builder. The information contained within this object is updated each time a new item is built.

virtual IMultidimensionalInfo MultidimensionalInfo { get; set; }

Returns

IMultidimensionalInfo

Examples

Sample Snippet

Properties

The raster dataset builder properties.

virtual IPropertySet Properties { get; set; }

Returns

IPropertySet

Examples

Sample Snippet

RasterTypeOperation

The raster type operation helper object associated with this raster type. It provides the raster type with functions that aid construction of URIs and builder items.

virtual IRasterTypeOperation RasterTypeOperation { get; set; }

Returns

IRasterTypeOperation
